description: A customer onboarding flowchart has been created with default styling. Your task is to apply the company's new brand identity to the diagram located at ~/Diagrams/customer_onboarding.drawio. Using the specifications in ~/Desktop/brand_style_guide.txt, apply the required color codes, fonts, and shape effects (including shadows and rounded corners) to the Process Steps, Decisions, Terminators, and Connectors. Do not change the diagram structure, text, or connections. Save the updated diagram and export it as both a PNG to ~/Diagrams/exports/customer_onboarding.png and a PDF to ~/Diagrams/exports/customer_onboarding.pdf.
